emails.subject: Update to Online GTC's
emails.body: Update to Online GTC's I understand from Mark that in order to open up the utilities to trade financial, we will need to amend the GTC's to add some additional reps and provisions. Do you have a timetable for when we will be able to do that?

emails.subject: Update to Online GTC's
emails.body: Update to Online GTC's I understand from Mark that in order to open up the utilities to trade financial, we will need to amend the GTC's to add some additional reps and provisions. Do you have a timetable for when we will be able to do that?

emails.subject: Re: Update to Online GTC's
emails.body: Re: Update to Online GTC's I don't like amending GTC's but would like to discuss this issue with you and/or Mark when convenient. Thanks, Dave From: Tana Jones 03/14/2000 11:02 PM
